meta.title: A solid medium for culture and identification of human T-mycoplasmas

abstractHtml: A solid urea-containing medium buffered to pH 6.5 with a suitable mixture of KH2PO4 and Na2HPO4 produced enlarged T-mycoplasma colonies containing a white precipitate. This was absent from M. hominis colonies. The medium can be used for the isolation and identification of T-mycoplasmas.
